_doc: Third SIZE ladder for the canary-leakage curve (the third-family size-ladder robustness check: 'add a third family's size ladder'). A clean single-family, single-provider ladder on OpenRouter: the Ministral-2512 release at 3B/8B/14B, all instruct, all non-reasoning, served on ONE provider (OpenRouter) so it stays within-provider per the no-pooling rule. Holds alignment+family+release fixed and varies only size, to test whether scale REDUCES leakage in a third family beyond the Featherless-Qwen (rising) and OpenRouter-Llama (flat) ladders. arm G_scale_mistral.
